text: I wake up at six every morning, no matter the day. First, I drink water and stretch for ten minutes to energize my body. Then, I eat a light breakfast and check my daily tasks. My work schedule starts at nine—I focus on meetings or projects until lunch. At three, I take a break to exercise, usually yoga or a short run. Evenings are for winding down: I cook dinner, read for thirty minutes, and review my goals for tomorrow. Consistency is my secret—it helps me stay balanced and stress-free.
